old.first_200: The execute_transfer function has too many logging calls mixed with business logic. Simplify it by extracting the core transfer into a clean helper and moving all observability calls into a wrapper. R
old.last_200:

   b) compute both new values first, then assign both atomically
   c) explicit compensation on every exception path

If your refactor does not include rollback or atomic assignment, it is wrong.
